description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in casual, athletic-inspired attire. He wears a sleeveless shirt, loose cropped pants, and a belt, with fingerless gloves on both hands. A headset with a microphone is worn over a cap, and a crossbody bag is slung over his right shoulder, resting on his left hip. He also has a backpack on his back, and his footwear consists of low-profile shoes with visible socks. The figure's posture is upright and relaxed, with arms hanging naturally at his sides. The overall appearance suggests a youthful, active urban pedestrian, possibly a courier or messenger.
description: A stylized adult male in casual, athletic clothing with a headset, cap, crossbody bag, and backpack, standing upright. The figure has fingerless gloves and low-profile shoes, suggesting an active urban pedestrian.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless shirt, headset with microphone, cap, crossbody bag, gloves, and relaxed stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the headset, cap, backpack, and the profile of the crossbody bag, as well as the figure's upright posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the backpack, the strap of the crossbody bag, and the back of the cropped pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the headset, cap, backpack, and the figure's arm and glove details, mirroring the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless shirt, cropped athletic pants, fingerless gloves, cap, and belt
